library(tidyverse)
## ── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
## ✔ dplyr     1.2.0     ✔ readr     2.2.0
## ✔ forcats   1.0.1     ✔ stringr   1.6.0
## ✔ ggplot2   4.0.2     ✔ tibble    3.3.1
## ✔ lubridate 1.9.5     ✔ tidyr     1.3.2
## ✔ purrr     1.2.1     
## ── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
## ✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
## ✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
## ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
library(arrow)
## Some features are not enabled in this build of Arrow. Run `arrow_info()` for more information.
## The repository you retrieved Arrow from did not include all of Arrow's features.
## You can install a fully-featured version by running:
## `install.packages('arrow', repos = 'https://apache.r-universe.dev')`.
## 
## Attaching package: 'arrow'
## 
## The following object is masked from 'package:lubridate':
## 
##     duration
## 
## The following object is masked from 'package:utils':
## 
##     timestamp
library(forecast)
library(tseries)
## Registered S3 method overwritten by 'quantmod':
##   method            from
##   as.zoo.data.frame zoo
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(knitr)
INPUT_FILE <- "../../data/processed/merged_features_weekly.parquet"
FREQ <- 52
ALPHA <- 0.05

XREG_VARS <- c(
  "api_energy_and_lubricants",
  "api_fertilisers_and_soil_improvers",
  "api_plant_protection_products",
  "api_fresh_fruit",
  "api_fresh_vegetables",
  "fuel_petrol_price",
  "fuel_diesel_price",
  "sppi_road_freight"
)

DUMMY_VARS <- c(
  "shock_2021q4_2023q1",
  "post_shock"
)

calc_smape <- function(actual, pred) {
  mean(200 * abs(actual - pred) / (abs(actual) + abs(pred)), na.rm = TRUE)
}

build_xreg <- function(data, vars) {

  avail <- vars[vars %in% names(data)]

  if (length(avail) == 0) return(NULL)

  mat <- data %>%
    select(all_of(avail)) %>%
    as.matrix()

  for (j in seq_len(ncol(mat))) {
    col_mean <- mean(mat[, j], na.rm = TRUE)
    mat[is.na(mat[, j]), j] <- col_mean
  }

  mat
}
df <- arrow::read_parquet(INPUT_FILE) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  arrange(date)

if (!"target_was_missing" %in% names(df)) df$target_was_missing <- 0L

commodities <- unique(df$commodity)
all_results <- list()
all_models  <- list()
all_preds   <- list()

for (comm in commodities) {

  sub <- df %>%
    filter(commodity == comm) %>%
    arrange(date)

  train_df <- sub %>%
    filter(split == "train")

  test_df <- sub %>%
    filter(split == "test")

  if (nrow(train_df) < 30 || nrow(test_df) == 0) next

  n_test   <- nrow(test_df)
  train_ts <- ts(train_df$target_price, frequency = FREQ)

  real_idx <- test_df$target_was_missing == 0

  base_model <- auto.arima(train_ts, seasonal = TRUE, ic = "aicc")

  arma <- base_model$arma
  pdq  <- c(arma[1], arma[6], arma[2])
  PDQ  <- c(arma[3], arma[7], arma[4])

  avail_xreg <- XREG_VARS[
    XREG_VARS %in% names(sub) &
      sapply(XREG_VARS, function(v) sum(!is.na(train_df[[v]])) > 10)
  ]

  avail_dummies <- DUMMY_VARS[DUMMY_VARS %in% names(sub)]

  pred_full <- rep(NA, n_test)
  pred_dum  <- rep(NA, n_test)

  xreg_vars_full <- c(avail_xreg, avail_dummies)

  xreg_train_full <- build_xreg(train_df, xreg_vars_full)
  xreg_test_full  <- build_xreg(test_df,  xreg_vars_full)

  model_full <- tryCatch(
    Arima(
      train_ts,
      order = pdq,
      seasonal = list(order = PDQ, period = FREQ),
      xreg = xreg_train_full,
      include.drift = FALSE
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (!is.null(model_full)) {

    fc_full <- forecast(
      model_full,
      xreg = xreg_test_full,
      h = n_test
    )

    pred_full <- as.numeric(fc_full$mean)

    smape_full <- round(
      calc_smape(test_df$target_price[real_idx], pred_full[real_idx]),
      4
    )
  } else {
    smape_full <- NA
  }

  if (length(avail_dummies) > 0) {

    xreg_train_dum <- build_xreg(train_df, avail_dummies)
    xreg_test_dum  <- build_xreg(test_df,  avail_dummies)

    model_dum <- tryCatch(
      Arima(
        train_ts,
        order = pdq,
        seasonal = list(order = PDQ, period = FREQ),
        xreg = xreg_train_dum,
        include.drift = FALSE
      ),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (!is.null(model_dum)) {

      fc_dum <- forecast(
        model_dum,
        xreg = xreg_test_dum,
        h = n_test
      )

      pred_dum <- as.numeric(fc_dum$mean)

      smape_dum <- round(
        calc_smape(test_df$target_price[real_idx], pred_dum[real_idx]),
        4
      )

    } else {
      smape_dum <- NA
    }

  } else {
    model_dum <- NULL
    smape_dum <- NA
  }

  models_fitted <- list(
    "Full xreg"    = model_full,
    "Dummies only" = model_dum
  )

  results <- tibble(
    commodity = comm,
    model = c("Full xreg", "Dummies only"),
    sMAPE = c(smape_full, smape_dum)
  ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(sMAPE))

  pred_df <- tibble(
    date = test_df$date,
    actual = test_df$target_price,
    full = pred_full,
    dummies = pred_dum
  )

  all_results[[comm]] <- results
  all_models[[comm]]  <- models_fitted
  all_preds[[comm]]   <- pred_df
}

results_df <- bind_rows(all_results)

ALL REGRESSION WITH ARIMA ERRORS — sMAPE

commodity model sMAPE
Bulb Onions (Yellow) Full xreg 18.4171
Bulb Onions (Yellow) Dummies only 14.9966
Cabbage Full xreg 5.7391
Cabbage Dummies only 6.3152
Carrots Full xreg 16.0617
Carrots Dummies only 12.4178
Lettuce Full xreg 5.9924
Lettuce Dummies only 5.3916 
best_df <- results_df %>%
  group_by(commodity) %>%
  slice_min(sMAPE, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

BEST MODEL PER COMMODITY (by sMAPE)

commodity model sMAPE
Bulb Onions (Yellow) Dummies only 14.9966
Cabbage Full xreg 5.7391
Carrots Dummies only 12.4178
Lettuce Dummies only 5.3916

Residual diagnostics for best models

## 
## #### Bulb Onions (Yellow) — Dummies only 
## 
##   Ljung-Box(10) p-value: 0.9809 ✓
##   Shapiro-Wilk p-value: 0.0000 ✗
## 
## 
## #### Cabbage — Full xreg 
## 
##   Ljung-Box(10) p-value: 0.1297 ✓
##   Shapiro-Wilk p-value: 0.0000 ✗
## 
## 
## #### Carrots — Dummies only 
## 
##   Ljung-Box(10) p-value: 0.4795 ✓
##   Shapiro-Wilk p-value: 0.0000 ✗
## 
## 
## #### Lettuce — Dummies only 
## 
##   Ljung-Box(10) p-value: 0.9996 ✓
##   Shapiro-Wilk p-value: 0.0000 ✗
plots <- list()

for (i in seq_len(nrow(best_df))) {

  comm <- best_df$commodity[i]
  best_model <- best_df$model[i]
  best_smape <- best_df$sMAPE[i]

  sub <- df %>%
    filter(commodity == comm) %>%
    arrange(date)

  train_df <- sub %>%
    filter(split == "train") %>%
    drop_na(target_price)

  cutoff <- max(train_df$date) - 365 * 2

  train_plot <- train_df %>%
    filter(date >= cutoff)

  pred_df <- all_preds[[comm]]

  pred_col <- switch(
    best_model,
    "Full xreg" = "full",
    "Dummies only" = "dummies"
  )

  test_plot <- pred_df %>%
    select(date, actual, pred = all_of(pred_col))

  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(
      data = train_plot,
      aes(x = date, y = target_price),
      color = "grey60",
      linewidth = 0.7
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = test_plot,
      aes(x = date, y = actual, color = "Actual"),
      linewidth = 0.9
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = test_plot,
      aes(x = date, y = pred, color = "Forecast"),
      linewidth = 0.9,
      linetype = "dashed"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Actual" = "#2c3e50",
        "Forecast" = "#e74c3c"
      ),
      name = NULL
    ) +
    labs(
      title = comm,
      subtitle = sprintf(
        "%s  |  sMAPE = %.2f",
        best_model,
        best_smape
      ),
      x = NULL,
      y = "Price"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )

  plots[[i]] <- p
}

if (length(plots) > 0) {

  combined <- wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 2) +
    plot_annotation(
      title = "Regression with ARIMA Errors — Forecast vs Actual",
      theme = theme(
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)
      )
    )

  print(combined)
}
